# RFC NNNN: Short title

## Summary

One paragraph. What does this RFC propose, at the highest level?

## Motivation

Why are we doing this? What user problem or architectural need does it
address? What happens if we do nothing?

## Guide-level explanation

Explain the proposal as if teaching it to a new contributor. Include
examples.

## Reference-level explanation

Technical details sufficient to implement. Public API surface. Data model
changes. SQL behavior. Error shapes.

## Drawbacks

Why should we *not* do this? What does it cost — complexity, scope, risk?

## Rationale and alternatives

Why this design? What other designs were considered? What is the impact
of not doing this?

## Prior art

Prior work in this project, in real BigQuery, in other emulators, in other
databases.

## Unresolved questions

Open questions that should be resolved before acceptance (move to
"Future possibilities" if they are post-acceptance questions).

## Future possibilities

Natural extensions of this work that are explicitly out of scope for this
RFC.
